executive_summary: Latest updates from 4 sources covering the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Monitoring 4 key developments. AI analysis refreshing shortly.
execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: Israeli military reports multiple Iranian missile interceptions. Video: Netanyahu orders military to ‘further expand’ invasion of Lebanon. Trump: US will shut down attempt to charge Hormuz passage toll in minutes. Netanyahu orders deeper Israeli invasion into Lebanon. Situation remains active.

key_developments.headline: Israeli military reports multiple Iranian missile interceptions
key_developments.detail: The Israeli military said it detected multiple ballistic missile launches from Iran targeting southern Israel, triggering sirens across affected areas. key_developments.headline: Video: Netanyahu orders military to ‘further expand’ invasion of Lebanon
key_developments.detail: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu announced on Sunday in a video statement that he has instructed the military to “further expand” its invasion of southern Lebanon, as tensions rise amid the ongoing US-Israeli war on Iran. key_developments.headline: Trump: US will shut down attempt to charge Hormuz passage toll in minutes
key_developments.detail: President Donald Trump said the United States could quickly shut down any Iranian attempt to charge toll fees for ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz. “We could close that up in 2 minutes. terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
